title: Crispy Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: Delicious, floral, crisp lamb kebabs with a tangy apple cider vinegar glaze, air-fried to perfection for a crowd-pleasing Mediterranean treat
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, grated onion, chopped parsley, oregano, cumin, smoked paprika, minced garlic, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir in olive oil and apple cider vinegar to bind the mixture and add tang.
3. Add the lemon zest and mix until evenly distributed.
4. Shape the mixture into 12 small, tight meatballs about 1.5 inches in diameter, then flatten each into a thin oval to mimic kebab shape.
6. Lightly spray the air fryer basket with non‑stick spray or brush a small amount of olive oil to prevent sticking.
7. Place the flattened lamb pieces in a single layer in the basket, ensuring they don’t overlap.
8. Air fry for 8–10 minutes, flipping halfway through, until the outside is crisp and the internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium doneness.
9. Remove from air fryer and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
10. Optional: garnish with chopped mint or extra parsley and serve with a side of tzatziki or a lemon‑olive oil drizzle.
